FX.title: [USD/JPY] DOWN: Yield Spread Compression and Dovish Fed Signals Pressure Yen
tldr_points: Fed chair Powell’s exit fuels USD weakness
Technical structure suggests lower‑half of range
FX.excerpt: Yield spread compression and Powell’s exit tilt USD/JPY lower amid bearish technical framework.
FX.comment: Yield spread compression and Powell’s exit create bearish pressure on USD/JPY.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Technical Support Aligns with Improving Risk Appetite Amid AI-Driven Momentum
STOCKS.excerpt: Technical indicators suggest upward momentum as institutional flows normalize post-volatility period.
STOCKS.comment: Technical support alignment with improving institutional flows justifies bullish bias

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Legislative Momentum and On‑Chain Efficiencies Reinforce Bull Bias
CRYPTO.excerpt: Bullish bias on BTC/USD driven by policy wins, on‑chain perp efficiency, and supportive technicals.
CRYPTO.comment: Policy clarity and on‑chain perp liquidity create a bullish environment, with technicals supporting higher highs.
